displayTitle: Every MT Test, Start to Finish

beats.narration: Magnetic particle testing is simple to demonstrate, and easy to do badly. The cure is discipline: every test walks the same backbone, end to end.

payload.title: THE MT BACKBONE
payload.sub: Every magnetic particle test, start to finish.

beats.narration: Three steps before any magnetism: know the job from the procedure, clean the surface, verify equipment, particles, and lighting.
Magnetize the part, then apply particles while the current is still flowing: the continuous method. Particles gather over leakage fields, and an indication forms.
Interpret what formed. But a flaw lying along the flux may not show — so magnetize again, roughly perpendicular, and the second shot catches it.

payload.heading: Why you magnetize twice
payload.note: FLAW ALONG FLUX CAN HIDE · SHOOT TWO DIRECTIONS

beats.narration: The whole backbone in five words: preparation, magnetization, application, interpretation, documentation. Everything in this course is detail hung on that frame.
